scripts.zip:android: npm run build:ext && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path extension\manifest.json, extension\background.js -DestinationPath public\novel-studio-connector-android.zip -Force"
scripts.zip:pc: npm run build:ext && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path extension-pc\manifest.json, extension-pc\background.js, extension-pc\content.js -DestinationPath public\novel-studio-connector-pc.zip -Force"
scripts.zip:all: npm run zip:android && npm run zip:pc
scripts.build:ext: powershell -Command "if (!(Test-Path extension)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path extension }; if (!(Test-Path extension-pc)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path extension-pc }; Copy-Item extension-src/manifest.json extension/manifest.json; Copy-Item extension-pc-src/manifest.json extension-pc/manifest.json; npx.cmd -y javascript-obfuscator extension-src/background.js --output extension/background.js --compact true --self-defending false; npx.cmd -y javascript-obfuscator extension-pc-src/background.js --output extension-pc/background.js --compact true --self-defending false; npx.cmd -y javascript-obfuscator extension-pc-src/content.js --output extension-pc/content.js --compact true --self-defending false"
